ac_evidence.ac: System interface with Update(week int, state *GameState, rng *rand.Rand) []Event
TurnProcessor struct managing ordered list of systems
ProcessWeek method that calls each system in order
Event collection and addition to GameState history
Deterministic execution order (environment → production → social → economic → events)
Unit tests verify each system is called in order

existing_work_summary: Found existing simulation package with GameState model (state.go), deterministic RNG (rng.go), and core types (types.go). Extended RNG with Rand() method to satisfy *rand.Rand interface.
